page: Microsoft Azure E104i_v5 is an isolated virtual machine instance powered by the x86_64 architecture. It features a dedicated Intel Xeon 8370C processor operating at 2.8 GHz, delivering 52 physical cores and 104 vCPUs via hyperthreading. The hardware configuration includes 672.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 6.46 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include local storage or onboard GPU accelerators, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external network-attached volumes.

In benchmark evaluations, the E104i_v5 demonstrates strong multi-core processing and memory subsystem performance. Multi-core stress-ng tests and Geekbench multi-core scores are rated as strong, supported by high-speed memory bandwidth reaching 334.7 GB/sec for large-block read operations. Cryptographic capabilities are highly efficient, with the Passmark CPU encryption test achieving a top-tier rating. Database operations and Redis SET performance are also strong, registering 93.05 million operations per second. However, single-core performance remains average, and large-scale LLM text generation is weak, reflecting the lack of dedicated GPU hardware.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the E104i_v5 offers a high-density resource profile suitable for enterprise workloads that require physical isolation and substantial memory capacity without the overhead of local storage. The absence of bundled local storage and GPUs optimizes the cost profile for memory-heavy, CPU-bound tasks. This instance is best suited for large relational databases, in-memory caching systems like Redis, multi-threaded data decompression, and high-throughput web serving.
description: Microsoft Azure E104i_v5 is an isolated virtual machine instance configured with 104 vCPUs and 52 physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8370C processor running at 2.8 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture, it features 672.0 GB of RAM, yielding 6.46 GB of memory per core, with no local storage or GPU accelerators. Performance benchmarks indicate strong multi-core capabilities, high memory bandwidth, and top-tier cryptographic execution, though single-core performance is average. The instance is highly optimized for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, showing strong results in database operations and Redis SET performance. It is best suited for large-scale relational databases, in-memory data stores, and high-throughput web serving where physical isolation is required.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E104i_v5 is an isolated virtual machine featuring 104 vCPUs, 672 GB of RAM, and an Intel Xeon 8370C processor, optimized for memory-intensive enterprise workloads and database operations.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E104i_v5 is an isolated instance with 104 vCPUs and 672 GB RAM, designed for secure, memory-intensive database workloads.
tagline: An isolated, high-memory virtual machine featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors for demanding database and enterprise workloads.

672.0 GB of system memory for high-density, memory-bound applications
Isolated instance configuration running on Microsoft Hyper-V
